subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! In the divine dispensary there exist a hundred thousand swift remedies and true medicines [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی در اجزاخانه رحمانی صدهزار علاج فوری و دوای حقیقی موجود ولی
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @love of God, @teachings as spirit of the age, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
